overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character in a black suit with glowing green spider emblem walking through a rainy urban Chinatown district at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks and intersections, briefly engaging in combat with a hostile pedestrian before continuing down the street past various storefronts and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked vehicles and commercial buildings

events.description: approaching intersection with crosswalk and traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk behind a garbage truck, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: garbage truck moving slowly along the curb ahead

entered.detail: convenience store with large illuminated red and white signage
multi-story red brick buildings with commercial storefronts
multi-story brick buildings with various signs and awnings
tall street lamps casting warm light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, following a garbage truck. The street is lined with brick buildings and illuminated by warm street lamps. Ahead, the glowing sign of a 24-hour convenience store marks the approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with convenience store and meat market

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection alongside other pedestrians
pedestrian in denim jacket reacts aggressively, character performs dodge maneuver

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection then engaging in brief combat with a hostile pedestrian who lunges from the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in denim jacket and red cap lunging toward the character aggressively

entered.detail: yellow circular illuminated sign with red text reading MEAT
metal security shutters covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection, passing the 24-hour mart on the left. After crossing, a pedestrian in a denim jacket suddenly attacks, prompting a defensive dodge. The street features a prominent yellow meat market sign and graffiti-covered shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with closed storefronts and delivery vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk past parked delivery trucks and various pedestrians

entered.detail: large white delivery truck parked at the curb with headlights on
tall building with illuminated Chinese characters and golden signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street, the character passes closed storefronts with graffiti-covered shutters and parked delivery trucks. In the distance, a large hotel building with illuminated Chinese signage becomes visible as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with hotel and taxi stand

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for traffic to clear before crossing
crossing the intersection alongside a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians, passing a yellow taxi

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: mature trees planted along the sidewalk with green foliage

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the crosswalk near the hotel building, then crosses the intersection with other pedestrians. A yellow taxi waits at the curb while the character passes street trees lining the opposite sidewalk, continuing down the illuminated city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy Chinatown district at night, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a series of bustling urban intersections. It begins with the character following a garbage truck past brick buildings and warm street lamps toward the glowing sign of a 24-hour convenience store. As the character crosses the intersection, the scene shifts toward a meat market with graffiti-covered shutters where a sudden attack by a pedestrian prompts a quick defensive dodge. The camera then tracks forward past parked delivery trucks and closed storefronts before the view opens up to reveal a large hotel building with illuminated Chinese signage. Finally, the movement concludes as the character waits at a crosswalk and passes a yellow taxi and street trees while merging with other pedestrians under the city lights.
